# [Part 3: Social Cognition, Bias and Priming]{style="color: #004b23"} {.unnumbered}

This part of the book addresses how the social context influences our cognition, the way we think. It comprises five chapters: 

- [False Consensus Effect](chapter16.qmd)
- [Facial Feedback Hypothesis](chapter17.qmd)
- [Heat Priming-Hostile Perception Effect](chapter18.qmd)
- [Florida Priming Effect](chapter19.qmd)
- [Hot Coffee Effect](chapter20.qmd)
